description: Find matmul_block + eltwise_chain compute kernel examples

details: Plan: full flash-attention online-softmax. QKT matmul_block transpose=true with cb_k in [Dt x kv] col-major grid order, PV transpose=false cb_v natural. Fold persistent-CB pops into eltwise_chain lifecycles (m_run popped in corr chain, l_run in l_new, o_run in o_new) to avoid manual pop bugs. Acceptance shapes all have num_kv_blocks==1 (j==0 path). Multi-core: contiguous q-block run per core.

single-tile (1,1,32,32) none/auto. trisc0 unpack stuck at QKT matmul_block wait_front; trisc1 math stuck inside reduce MAX REDUCE_ROW _configure_src_zero_flag_; trisc2 pack stuck tensix_sync; writer cb_wait_front(cb_out); reader idle. Compute-internal dst/pack sync deadlock across helpers.

Bisection: QK-only OK, +reduceMAX OK, +Pchain OK, +sumreduce+PV OK, full j==0+normalize (no pre-scale) OK. Adding transform_in_place<cb_q> pre-scale -> HANG. Root cause: in-place same-CB pre-scale deadlocks.
Acceptance test: 28/28 passed (bf16, self/cross, mha/gqa/mqa, none/custom mask, auto/explicit scale). Fix: non-in-place pre-scale cb_q->cb_qs.
Debug multi-KV-block suite 7/7 pass (online-softmax recurrence j>0, Q-chunking, multi-core, D=128, uneven KV). PCC>=0.99.

Fixed m_run CB leak between Q-blocks on same core (drain cb_m_run after normalize). Long-context multi-head 4096 PCC 0.9676->0.99998. Also made accumulation-path CBs fp32. Acceptance 28/28, debug 10/10.
Golden bounded subset (bf16 tile_aligned small shapes): 24 passed, 12 xfailed (causal refused), 0 failed, 0 xpassed. SUPPORTED/EXCLUSIONS wiring correct, no drift.

detail: 42 passed after adding float32+bfloat8_b to SUPPORTED[dtype]; probe PCC fp32=0.999999 bf8b=0.9997
240 passed 48 skipped(fp32+bf16_acc EXCLUSION). fp32 D=128 large-S OOMs (R4 territory), not excluded.
108 failed(98 OOM R4 + 10 pre-existing bf16 regression) 991 passed 1208 xfailed. bf8b 400/424, fp32 162/212. Fixed bf8b+custom-mask via bf16 score-path intermediates.

note: probe: w_non_aligned (D-only) relRMS=0.003 already correct (zero D-pad); S_kv non-aligned relRMS=0.15-0.37 fails RMS<=0.05, PCC stays high. Root cause: padded key columns contribute exp(0-max) to softmax row-sum -> l inflated -> output magnitude too small.

Fix: use partial SUM reduce scaler (calculate_and_prepare_partial_reduce_scalers, partial_positions=S_kv%32) applied via ReducePartialScaler::last_tile_at(1) on the SUM reduce, only in the last KV block. MAX reduce unchanged (inflated max cancels in normalized softmax). PV safe (V padding zero). D-padding needs no code (zero-pad).

Added partial SUM reduce scaler for S_kv non-aligned. Reader emits [full,partial] scaler pair via prepare_reduce_scaler (convenience wrapper calculate_and_prepare_partial_reduce_scalers is broken as shipped: passes 4 template args to 3-param prepare_reduce_scaler). Compute passes ReducePartialScaler::last_tile_at(1) on last KV block. New CT args skv_non_aligned/skv_last_valid; SUM scaler CB sized 2 when non-aligned.
11/11 OK incl gqa/mqa/cross/custom-mask; relRMS ~0.004 (was 0.15-0.37); aligned no-regression PCC 0.99999
120/120 pass: 10 non-aligned shapes x {bf16,fp32,bf8b} x {none,custom} x {auto,explicit}

test_golden: 98 failed / 1162 passed / 1008 xfailed (118s, no hang). ALL 98 failures are alignment=tile_aligned large-head_dim OOM (R4 scope). 200 non-aligned cells PASS (80 bf16, 80 bf8b, 40 fp32), 0 non-aligned failures, 0 xpass-drift. test_regression: 10 failed (pre-existing bf16 tile_aligned precision) / 29 passed. No regression: tile_aligned path byte-identical (gated on skv_non_aligned).

description: Find on-device causal mask generation helpers

detail: causal = generated additive mask reusing custom-mask softmax path; per-tile classify kt<qt=0 / kt==qt=triangular / kt>qt=-inf; cap KV loop at diagonal block to skip future blocks (perf + avoid all-(-inf) NaN). Mask generated in reader via L1 byte-writes in score_dtype.

23 passed 1 skipped (fp32 D>=128 OOM). causal matches reference bf16/fp32/bf8b, mha/gqa/mqa, auto/explicit scale, non-aligned S; causal==explicit-triangular-mask; cross excluded; is_causal+mask ValueError.

1654 passed / 146 failed / 468 xfailed / 1 skipped, 129s no hang. 0 xpassed (no drift), 0 CheckOutputError. All 146 fails = large-head-dim L1 OOM (R4 boundary): none 48 + custom 50 (=98 R2 baseline, no regression) + causal 48. Causal ~492 pass / 48 OOM = 91% majority.
28 passed; OOM cells D=256/512/1024 now fit via single-buffered compute->compute CBs + adaptive chunk sizing; PCC>=0.9999
